summary: Tested sound preview and double tick features for mobile app notifications and chat messages. Fixed a bug in sounds.js where playNotificationSound used wrong settings key.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection fails on initial connect with 'WebSocket is closed before the connection is established' - reconnection works

passed_tests: Settings page has 'Notification Sound' selector with dropdown
Settings page has 'Message Sound' selector with dropdown
Preview buttons (cyan PlayCircle icon) present for both Notification and Message sounds
Preview buttons trigger sound playback when clicked (Web Audio API)
Sound auto-plays when selecting a new sound option from dropdown
Volume slider present and affects sound preview volume (0-100%)
Sound options include all 8: Default, Chime, Bell, Pop, Ding, Swoosh, Bubble, None (Silent)
data-testid attributes present: preview-notification-sound, preview-message-sound, notification-sound-select, message-sound-select, volume-slider
ChatView.jsx correctly implements single tick (Check icon) for sent messages
ChatView.jsx correctly implements double cyan tick (CheckCheck icon with text-[#00F0FF]) for read messages
Read receipt WebSocket handler (handleReadReceipt) updates tick colors in real-time by modifying read_by array
Incoming message handler triggers playMessageSound(settings) for messages from other users

bug_fixed.fix: Changed to `settings.notifications.sound || 'default'` to match SettingsContext default settings

critical_code_review_comments: Sound utility uses Web Audio API to generate tones programmatically - no audio files needed

8 sound types implemented: default (880Hz sine), chime (1047Hz with harmonics), bell (659Hz triangle), pop (440Hz square), ding (1319Hz sine), swoosh (frequency sweep), bubble (523Hz with pitch bend), none (silent)
Double tick color correctly uses #00F0FF (cyan) via Tailwind text-[#00F0FF] class
Read receipt WebSocket event correctly updates message.read_by array to trigger cyan double tick
Incoming messages correctly trigger playMessageSound() for messages not from current user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sound preview features fully tested and working. Fixed bug in sounds.js where playNotificationSound used wrong settings key (notificationSound -> sound). Real-time chat tick color testing requires two users which isn't feasible in automated tests, but code review confirms correct implementation: single gray tick for sent messages, cyan double tick (#00F0FF) when read_by array has more than 1 user. WebSocket has intermittent connection issues on initial connect but reconnects work.
